title: Iran says it will halt attacks on Israel after waves of strikes
summary_full: President Donald Trump had urged restraint after the two countries intensified attacks, and Iran said it would halt its strikes.
summary_public: President Donald Trump had urged restraint after the two countries intensified attacks, and Iran said it would halt its strikes.
